notes: Multi-select on the load. Pricing is per-occurrence/per-hour by contract — kept out of the taxonomy.

accessorials.name: Detention
accessorials.description: Driver wait beyond the free time at pickup or delivery.

accessorials.name: Layover
accessorials.description: Overnight delay at shipper/consignee causing a missed dispatch.

accessorials.name: Lumper
accessorials.description: Third-party labor charged to load/unload at the facility.

accessorials.name: Tarping
accessorials.description: Cargo requires tarp coverage; flat/step-deck only.

accessorials.name: Escort
accessorials.description: Oversize/overweight load requires pilot car or police escort.

accessorials.name: Residential — Pickup
accessorials.description: Pickup is at a residence (limited access, smaller equipment).

accessorials.name: Residential — Delivery
accessorials.description: Delivery is at a residence (limited access, smaller equipment).

accessorials.name: Inside Pickup
accessorials.description: Driver moves freight past the dock/threshold at pickup.

accessorials.name: Inside Delivery
accessorials.description: Driver moves freight past the dock/threshold at delivery.

accessorials.name: Fuel Surcharge
accessorials.description: Diesel-indexed surcharge; usually contracted, not per-load.

accessorials.name: Stop Off
accessorials.description: Additional pickup/delivery beyond the first two stops.

accessorials.name: Permits
accessorials.description: Oversize/overweight permits required across crossed states.

accessorials.name: TONU (Truck Order Not Used)
accessorials.description: Reservation fee when a booked load is canceled at the last minute.
